sentence: 用骚货这种词骂人是很不尊重的。
pinyin: Yòng sāo huò zhè zhǒng cí mà rén shì hěn bù zūnzhòng de.
english: Using words like "slut" to insult someone is very disrespectful.

meaning: 1. to explore; 2. to go on an expedition; 3. adventure
sentence: 他喜欢去丛林探险。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān qù cónglín tànxiǎn.
english: He loves going on expeditions in the jungle.

sentence: 运动会的开幕式非常精彩。
pinyin: Yùndònghuì de kāimùshì fēicháng jīngcǎi.
english: The opening ceremony of the sports meet was spectacular.

sentence: 我提前在网上买好了火车车票。
pinyin: Wǒ tí qián zài wǎng shàng mǎi hǎo le huǒ chē chē piào.
english: I bought the train ticket online in advance.

sentence: 这位新星的演出引发了全场瞩目。
pinyin: Zhè wèi xīnxīng de yǎnchū yǐnfāle quánchǎng zhǔmù.
english: This rising star's performance drew everyone's attention.

meaning: 1. courtyard; 2. garden; 3. yard; 4. patio; 5. CL:個|个[gè]; 6. (old) se
sentence: 奶奶在院子里种了很多花。
pinyin: Nǎinai zài yuànzi lǐ zhòng le hěn duō huā.
english: Grandma planted a lot of flowers in the yard.

sentence: 那片区域是军事禁区，不能随便进入。
pinyin: Nà piàn qūyù shì jūnshì jìnqū, bù néng suíbiàn jìnrù.
english: That area is a military restricted zone and you can't just enter it.

meaning: 1. low pitch; 2. quiet (voice); 3. subdued; 4. low-key; 5. low-profile
sentence: 他虽然很有钱，但为人十分低调。
pinyin: Tā suīrán hěn yǒu qián, dàn wéirén shífēn dī diào.
english: Although he's very wealthy, he keeps a very low profile.

sentence: 这个礼盒包装得非常精美。
pinyin: Zhège lǐhé bāozhuāng de fēicháng jīngměi.
english: This gift box is packaged exquisitely.

sentence: 驾车时请不要使用手机。
pinyin: Jiàchē shí qǐng bùyào shǐyòng shǒujī.
english: Please do not use your phone while driving.

sentence: 这支球队引进了一名外援来加强阵容。
pinyin: Zhè zhī qiú duì yǐn jìn le yī míng wài yuán lái jiā qiáng zhèn róng.
english: This team brought in a foreign player to strengthen the lineup.

sentence: 颁奖典礼将在周五晚上举行。
pinyin: Bānjiǎng diǎnlǐ jiāng zài zhōuwǔ wǎnshang jǔxíng.
english: The award ceremony will be held on Friday evening.

sentence: 报告中有一些重要数据缺失。
pinyin: Bào gào zhōng yǒu yī xiē zhòng yào shù jù quē shī.
english: Some important data is missing from the report.

meaning: 1. to receive sb; 2. to grant an interview
sentence: 市长接见了外国代表团。
pinyin: Shìzhǎng jiējiàn le wàiguó dàibiǎotuán.
english: The mayor received the foreign delegation.

sentence: 周末我打算去看爸妈。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒ dǎsuàn qù kàn bàmā.
english: I plan to visit my mom and dad this weekend.

sentence: 那个小村子坐落在一条河谷里。
pinyin: Nàge xiǎo cūnzi zuòluò zài yī tiáo hégǔ lǐ.
english: That small village is nestled in a river valley.

meaning: 1. handed down in a family; 2. family traditions
sentence: 这个菜谱是我们家家传下来的。
pinyin: Zhège càipǔ shì wǒmen jiā jiāchuán xià lái de.
english: This recipe has been handed down in our family.

meaning: 1. course of study; 2. teaching module at university; 3. tutorial
sentence: 网上有很多免费的Python教程。
pinyin: Wǎng shàng yǒu hěn duō miǎnfèi de Python jiàochéng.
english: There are many free Python tutorials online.

meaning: 1. to skip a grade; 2. to bypass ranks; 3. to go over the head of one&
sentence: 他不满部门经理的决定，直接越级向总裁投诉。
pinyin: Tā bùmǎn bùmén jīnglǐ de juédìng, zhíjiē yuèjí xiàng zǒngcái tóusù.
english: Unhappy with his manager's decision, he went over his head and complained directly to the CEO.

sentence: 这位分析员每天关注市场动态。
pinyin: Zhè wèi fēnxīyuán měitiān guānzhù shìchǎng dòngtài.
english: This analyst follows market trends every day.

meaning: 1. horse's head; 2. same as 碼頭|码头[mǎ tóu], pier
sentence: 那匹马把马头伸出栏杆外张望。
pinyin: Nà pǐ mǎ bǎ mǎtóu shēn chū lángān wài zhāngwàng.
english: The horse stretched its head out over the fence to look around.

sentence: 这位物理学家研究量子力学多年了。
pinyin: Zhè wèi wùlǐ xuéjiā yánjiū liàngzǐ lìxué duō nián le.
english: This physicist has been researching quantum mechanics for many years.

sentence: 他身穿一件白衬衫走进了教室。
pinyin: Tā shēn chuān yī jiàn bái chènshān zǒu jìn le jiàoshì.
english: He walked into the classroom wearing a white shirt.

meaning: 1. cross; 2. crucifix; 3. yoke one has to endure
sentence: 教堂门口立着一个大十字架。
pinyin: Jiàotáng ménkǒu lì zhe yī gè dà shízìjià.
english: A large cross stands at the entrance of the church.

sentence: 孩子出生后需要按时接种疫苗。
pinyin: Háizi chūshēng hòu xūyào ànshí jiēzhòng yìmiáo.
english: After birth, children need to be vaccinated on schedule.

sentence: 他们的争吵背后有更深层的矛盾。
pinyin: Tāmen de zhēngchǎo bèihòu yǒu gèng shēncéng de máodùn.
english: Behind their argument lies a deeper underlying conflict.

meaning: 1. to transfer (for a specific purpose); 2. to allocate; 3. (computing
sentence: 程序运行时会自动调用这个函数。
pinyin: Chéngxù yùnxíng shí huì zìdòng diàoyòng zhège hánshù.
english: The program will automatically invoke this function when it runs.

sentence: 土壤里有数不清的微生物。
pinyin: Tǔrǎng lǐ yǒu shǔ bu qīng de wēishēngwù.
english: There are countless microorganisms in the soil.

sentence: 超市就在这个街区的转角处。
pinyin: Chāoshì jiù zài zhège jiēqū de zhuǎnjiǎo chù.
english: The supermarket is right at the corner of this block.

sentence: 博物馆里陈列着古代帝王的服饰。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ chénliè zhe gǔdài dìwáng de fúshì.
english: The museum displays the clothing of ancient monarchs.

meaning: 1. to input; 2. to throw in; 3. to unload; 4. to put into circulation
sentence: 公司决定在社交媒体上投放广告。
pinyin: Gōngsī juédìng zài shèjiāo méitǐ shàng tóufàng guǎnggào.
english: The company decided to place ads on social media.

sentence: 工人们正在铺设地下电缆。
pinyin: Gōngrén men zhèngzài pūshè dìxià diànlǎn.
english: Workers are laying underground cables.

sentence: 她的作文在比赛中得奖了。
pinyin: Tā de zuòwén zài bǐsài zhōng dé jiǎng le.
english: Her essay won a prize in the competition.

sentence: 这个地区有大型石化工厂。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū yǒu dàxíng shíhuà gōngchǎng.
english: This area has a large petrochemical plant.

sentence: 展览室里摆满了她的画作。
pinyin: Zhǎnlǎn shì lǐ bǎimǎn le tā de huàzuò.
english: The exhibition room was filled with her paintings.

sentence: 孩子昨晚突然高热，我们连夜去看医生。
pinyin: Háizi zuó wǎn tūrán gāorè, wǒmen liányè qù kàn yīshēng.
english: The child suddenly had a high fever last night, so we went to the doctor in the middle of the night.

sentence: 他终于获准进入实验室参观。
pinyin: Tā zhōngyú huòzhǔn jìnrù shíyànshì cānguān.
english: He finally obtained permission to visit the laboratory.

sentence: 学中文的时候先要学好拼音。
pinyin: Xué Zhōngwén de shíhou xiān yào xué hǎo pīnyīn.
english: When learning Chinese, you should first master pinyin.

sentence: 农业是国民经济的基础。
pinyin: Nóngyè shì guómín jīngjì de jīchǔ.
english: Agriculture is the foundation of the national economy.

meaning: foreign teacher (abbr. for 外國教師|外国教师); greenhorn; novice; amateurish;
sentence: 我们学校来了一位英国外教。
pinyin: Wǒmen xuéxiào lái le yī wèi Yīngguó wàijiào.
english: A foreign teacher from the UK has come to our school.

meaning: lack of discipline; to break a rule; to violate discipline; to breach
sentence: 他因违纪被取消了比赛资格。
pinyin: Tā yīn wéi jì bèi qǔxiāo le bǐsài zīgé.
english: He was disqualified from the competition for violating the rules.

sentence: 请按分项填写表格中的各项内容。
pinyin: Qǐng àn fēnxiàng tiánxiě biǎogé zhōng de gè xiàng nèiróng.
english: Please fill in each sub-item of the form accordingly.

meaning: referendum (abbr. for 公民投票[gong1 min2 tou2 piao4])
sentence: 这项提案将通过公投来决定。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng tí'àn jiāng tōngguò gōngtóu lái juédìng.
english: This proposal will be decided by referendum.

meaning: the five fingers of one's hand
sentence: 她的五指修长，很适合弹钢琴。
pinyin: Tā de wǔ zhǐ xiūcháng, hěn shìhé tán gāngqín.
english: Her five fingers are slender, perfect for playing the piano.

meaning: a port for external trade; a trading or transit post on border between
sentence: 货物从这个口岸进出口。
pinyin: Huòwù cóng zhège kǒu'àn jìnchūkǒu.
english: Goods are imported and exported through this port.

meaning: (Electronic) speakers; acoustics; sound field (i.e., in a room or thea
sentence: 他买了一套新音响放在客厅里。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī tào xīn yīnxiǎng fàng zài kètīng lǐ.
english: He bought a new stereo system for the living room.

sentence: 这份工作要求本科文凭。
pinyin: Zhè fèn gōngzuò yāoqiú běnkē wénpíng.
english: This job requires a bachelor's degree diploma.

meaning: work hard; do all one can to; strive for/argue strongly
sentence: 他力争在三十岁前拿到博士学位。
pinyin: Tā lìzhēng zài sānshí suì qián ná dào bóshì xuéwèi.
english: He is doing everything he can to get his PhD before turning thirty.

meaning: to join together; to link (especially transport)
sentence: 两段视频的衔接不太自然。
pinyin: Liǎng duàn shìpín de xiánjiē bù tài zìrán.
english: The transition between the two video clips isn't very smooth.

sentence: 这个小区住的大多是富人。
pinyin: Zhège xiǎoqū zhù de dàduō shì fùrén.
english: Most of the residents in this neighborhood are wealthy.
